BrevoSettings._comment: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) transactional email service. IMPORTANT: You MUST verify the SenderEmail in your Brevo account before emails will be delivered. Go to https://app.brevo.com/settings/senders to add and verify your sender email. Use an email address you own (e.g., your Gmail). Store ApiKey in environment variables for production (e.g., BREVO__APIKEY). Free tier: 300 emails/day.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com;Port=5432;Database=postgres;Username=postgres.dhbgcoscqujsfycytvns;Password=Maddy@15092001;SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=1;Maximum Pool Size=20;Connection Idle Lifetime=300;Timeout=60;Command Timeout=60;Keepalive=30;Tcp Keepalive=true
ConnectionStrings._comment: WARNING: This file may be committed to version control. For production, use environment variables or .NET User Secrets. See docs/DATABASE_SETUP.md for secure credential management. Using direct Supabase connection (Port=5432) with optimized pooling settings.

JwtSettings._comment: RS256 asymmetric signing using RSA key pair (TR-012). Session timeout 15 minutes (NFR-005). Keys loaded from src/backend/rsa-keys directory. IMPORTANT: Never commit private key to version control - use environment variables or Azure Key Vault in production.

CorsSettings._comment: Production frontend URL: propeliq.kesug.com. Development origins in appsettings.Development.json

RedisSettings._comment: Upstash Redis connection string format: redis://default:password@host:port. Set Enabled=false to disable Redis and use database-only fallback. AbortOnConnectFail=false enables graceful degradation per AG-001. Store connection string in environment variables for production (e.g., REDIS__CONNECTIONSTRING).

AppointmentSettings._comment: Minimum hours advance notice required for appointment cancellation (US_027 - FR-011). Configurable per deployment environment.

Pusher._comment: Pusher Channels configuration for real-time queue updates (US_030 - FR-013). Set Enabled=true and configure credentials from Pusher dashboard (https://dashboard.pusher.com). Free tier: 200K messages/day, 100 concurrent connections. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., PUSHER__KEY, PUSHER__SECRET).

FileStorage._comment: File storage paths for clinical document uploads (US_042). Temp path stores chunks during upload, permanent path stores finalized documents. Ensure these directories have proper permissions and are NOT in version control (add to .gitignore). In production, use Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3.

Hangfire._comment: Hangfire health check thresholds (US_043). MaxQueueDepth: Alert if enqueued jobs exceed this count. MaxFailedJobs: Alert if failed jobs exceed this count.

DocumentProcessing._comment: Document processing health check thresholds (US_043). MaxBacklogMinutes: Alert if documents remain in Uploaded status longer than this. MaxFailedJobs: Alert if failed documents exceed this count.

TwilioSettings._comment: Twilio SMS gateway for appointment reminders (US_037 - TR-010, FR-014). Set Enabled=true and configure credentials from Twilio console (https://console.twilio.com). Free tier: trial credits for testing. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., TWILIO__ACCOUNTSID, TWILIO__AUTHTOKEN).

SendGridSettings._comment: SendGrid email service for notifications (US_037 - TR-011, FR-014). Set Enabled=true and configure API key from SendGrid dashboard (https://app.sendgrid.com). Free tier: 100 emails/day. Store API key in environment variables for production (e.g., SENDGRID__APIKEY).

RiskScoringWeights._comment: US_038: Configurable weights for no-show risk scoring (TR-020). Default weights: lead time (30%), history (45%), confirmation (25%) sum to 1.0. Weights can be overridden in SystemSettings table (keys: Risk.LeadTimeWeight, Risk.HistoryWeight, Risk.ConfirmationWeight) for runtime configuration.

GoogleCalendarSettings._comment: US_039: Google Calendar API OAuth2 configuration (FR-024). Obtain ClientId and ClientSecret from Google Cloud Console (https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials). RedirectUri must match authorized redirect URI in Google Cloud Console. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., GOOGLECALENDARSETTINGS__CLIENTID, GOOGLECALENDARSETTINGS__CLIENTSECRET).

OutlookCalendarSettings._comment: US_040: Microsoft Outlook Calendar API OAuth2 configuration (FR-024). Obtain ClientId and ClientSecret from Azure Portal App Registration (https://portal.azure.com/#blade/Microsoft_AAD_RegisteredApps). TenantId 'common' supports both personal and organizational Microsoft accounts. RedirectUri must match authorized redirect URI in Azure App Registration. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., OUTLOOKCALENDARSETTINGS__CLIENTID, OUTLOOKCALENDARSETTINGS__CLIENTSECRET).

WaitlistSettings._comment: US_041: Waitlist slot availability notification configuration (AC-4). ResponseTimeoutMinutes: time to respond before notification expires (default 30 minutes). DetectionIntervalCron: job schedule for slot detection (every 2 minutes). TimeoutCheckIntervalCron: job schedule for timeout processing (every 1 minute).
